title: combretum indicum
intro: Combretum indicum, also known as the East Indian leadtree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Combretum indicum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. Combretum indicum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in traditional medicine, as well as being used in herbal preparations such as tea, capsules, and tinctures.
